title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Ergo - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
